name: Peako Limited
description: Peako Limited (ASX:PKO) is a mineral exploration company primarily focused on its flagship Eastman PGE Project located in the East Kimberley region of Western Australia. The company targets platinum group element (PGE) mineralisation within the Eastman layered ultramafic intrusive complex, which extends over 16.5 kilometers. Peako aims to identify significant PGE resources by exploring the broader mafic-ultramafic layers of the complex, distinguishing its approach from historical exploration that focused primarily on discontinuous stratiform chromitite lenses. The company is committed to advancing this underexplored area, which shares geological similarities with other established mineralised intrusions in the Halls Creek Orogen.
